dataset.title: Natural Durability of Wood: A Worldwide Checklist of Species
dataset.provider: Oregon State University Wood Innovation Center
dataset.sourceScale: 1 = very resistant; 2 = resistant; 3 = moderately resistant; 4 = nonresistant
dataset.mappingPolicy: The source scale is conservatively mapped to atlas classes; source class 4 maps to atlas class 4-5. Only an explicit (T) marker supplies termite resistance.

source.provider: Oregon State University Wood Innovation Center

references.title: Natural Durability of Wood: A Worldwide Checklist of Species
references.publisher: Oregon State University, Forest Research Laboratory

fungi.raw: OSU worldwide checklist — decay rating(s) 4 on the source 1–4 scale; conservatively mapped to atlas class 4-5
Liste mondiale OSU — classe(s) de résistance à la dégradation 4 sur l’échelle source de 1 à 4 ; conversion prudente vers la classe 4-5
